category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Nigeria EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入尼日利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入奈及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Nigeria SONCAP import conformity, SON standards activity, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 expectations, NERC grid-connection rules, emerging EV policy, and safety / EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与尼日利亚 SONCAP 进口符合性、SON 标准工作、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 要求、NERC 并网规则、新兴电动汽车政策及安全/EMC证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與奈及利亞 SONCAP 進口符合性、SON 標準工作、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 要求、NERC 併網規則、新興電動汽車政策及安全/EMC證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SONCAP scope determination, SON standards approval, NERC grid-connection approval, customs determination, tax incentive decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current Nigerian SONCAP, SON, NERC, electrical-installation, customs, tax, and state-level electricity requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SONCAP适用范围裁定、SON标准批准、NERC并网批准、海关裁定、税收激励结论或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行尼日利亚SONCAP、SON、NERC、电气安装、海关、税务及州级电力要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SONCAP適用範圍裁定、SON標準批准、NERC併網批准、海關裁定、稅收激勵結論或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行奈及利亞SONCAP、SON、NERC、電氣安裝、海關、稅務及州級電力要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Nigeria, the main practical gaps are SONCAP import conformity where the goods are regulated, proof against applicable NIS or approved IEC equivalents, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 safety and connector expectations, NERC or state-regulator grid coordination for connected sites, and EMC evidence. A blanket mandatory whole-unit EV charger certificate was not confirmed from official sources; scope should be verified for the exact HS code, model, charger type, and installation route.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入尼日利亚时，主要实际差距包括受管制货物的SONCAP进口符合性、适用NIS或认可IEC等效标准证据、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196安全与连接器要求、并网站点的NERC或州级监管协调，以及EMC证据。官方来源未确认统一适用于全部整机充电桩的强制证书；应按具体HS编码、型号、充电桩类型和安装路径核实适用范围。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入奈及利亞時，主要實際差距包括受管制貨物的SONCAP進口符合性、適用NIS或認可IEC等效標準證據、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196安全與連接器要求、併網站點的NERC或州級監管協調，以及EMC證據。官方來源未確認統一適用於全部整機充電樁的強制證書；應按具體HS編碼、型號、充電樁類型和安裝路徑核實適用範圍。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, conformity assessment body, customs authority, energy-transition office, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
